codeReview.summary: The feature delivers basic page navigation, tooltip rendering, and keyboard handlers, but it misses a required behavior and contains a blocking interaction defect in tooltip actions.

issues.description: Thumbnail items render only a numeric placeholder (`.page-thumb-num`) and no page preview canvas/image. The feature contract requires small page previews (0.2x scale), so expected behavior 'Thumbnail strip shows small page previews' is not implemented.

Tooltip is hidden immediately on highlight `onMouseLeave`, but the tooltip is rendered outside the SVG highlight group. Moving the cursor from highlight to tooltip triggers mouseleave, unmounting the tooltip before the action button can be clicked. This breaks required behavior 'Tooltip action button toggles entity decision' in real interaction.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-worker procedure requires browser interaction verification, but it does not enforce failing the feature when a required interaction cannot be completed. In this run, tooltip action clicks timed out and entity state remained unchanged, yet the worker reported success with no discovered issues.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 1c2359c4-4a84-400a-9249-720e1e570ff8): repeated timed-out attempts to click 'Keep instead' followed by eval result 'REDACT'; handoff.discoveredIssues is [] and successState is success.

summary: Review failed due to two blocking defects: missing real page preview thumbnails and a tooltip interaction flow that prevents clicking the tooltip action button during normal hover behavior.
